transcript.text:
A lot of people say "What is this?!" after tasting it...
Like dirty water?
[I'm here to break the prejudice]
[At this location that stands for 50 years in Mapo]
What should I eat first?
I'm curious Nervous
How do I explain this?
Hello everyone
I'm here at Mapo today
I'm going to try Pyeongyang Naengmyeon for the very first time today (Cold Buckwheat Noodles with Beef Broth)
A lot of people say "What is this?!" after tasting it...
I haven't tried it yet
I'm not sure if I'll like it
This place has been here for about 50 years in Mapo
It's 4 o'clock right now and the place is full
There are people taking tickets to hold their place in line

Let's go
[Eul Mil Dae] [Seoul, Mapo-gu]
Hello
It's my first time trying it I'm not sure if I'll like it
Regular Naengmyeon first
Just in case it doesn't suit my taste
1 of each for now The whole menu
Excuse me, I'll order 1 of each of every food item on the menu
-Even the raw skate? (stingray) -Yes
[Once the order goes in]
[They start making the noodles]
[Bibim Naengmyeon] (Spicy Buckwheat Noodles)
[Mul Naengmeyon] (Cold Buckwheat Noodles]
[Sliced Raw Skate (Stingray)]
[Nokdu Jeon] (Mungbean Pancake)
[I'm hungry...]

Let's try the kimchi
It's everywhere
Thank you
[I will not wear white anymore...]
Thank you
Naengmyeon! Thank you
[The whole menu is served]
She's the very first person to eat everything on the menu
You will not like it if it's your first time
What should I eat first?
I'll go ahead and mix up the spicy noodles first
These come with cucumbers, but I asked them to take those out
That's a lot of noodles
Mul Naengmyeon first
There are black spots on the noodles
The noodles also have a rough consistency

The owner said that you either love it or hate it
A lot of people are like "What?!" at first And they also describe it as...
Dirty water...?
I wonder if it'll be like that Let's try it
I'm curious
Nervous!
This isn't dirty water
This tastes very light Feels like it's not seasoned
It's good to eat the Mul Naengmyeon as it is
If you want, you can add wasabi and vinegar
But eating it without anything is the best
Some noodles now
What is that?
[Brisket Rice]
Thank you
This tastes fine for me I like it

The noodles taste very bland without any seasoning
I thought it would cut easily, but it's on the chewy side
How do I explain this?
It's very addicting
It's not "Delicious"
But
Ung?
Eng?
And you keep eating
It tastes fine It suits my taste
Let's eat some meat now
They are sliced very thin which I didn't expect at all
With some soy sauce
Very strong beef flavors with a mix of crunchiness and chewiness
[Not bad for a first-timer]
This is pretty bland as well

Let's try the Bibim Naengmyeon
This shouldn't be too different from the regular one
This is just like your everyday Bibim Naengmyeon
But the noodles feel different
These feel like thick flour noodles compared to the other chewy noodles
The sauce is very sweet & sour
[That's too much]
What if she can't finish it?
[Don't worry]
Nokdu Jeon (Mungbean Pancake)
This needs to be eaten when it's hot
Dip in soy sauce
This goes so well with Naengmyeon noodles
Beef slices on top
And raw skate 3 layers
Tasty

You must order the Nokdu Jeon It's delicious
Let's finish the Bibim Naengmyeon
WIth Chadol (brisket)
I mean Yangji sliced brisket
This is spicy
These definitely taste different than other regular Naengmyeon
I can't really compare these with other restaurants because it's my first time
I love Naengmyeon
The Nokdu Jeon is incredible
I'm going to finish it before it gets cold
With some spiced raw skate on top
And brisket
This is the 3 layer combo
3 layer combo
What's the real 3 layer combo?
Raw skate, beef, and what else?

Wasn't it Nokdu Jeon?
Spicy Naengmyeon with sashimi
The noodles are cut easily Even when I'm mixing it
The portions are huge
This is almost double the portion
Brisket rice
I was looking for the rice, but it's here
Just like this
I had no idea
I'll try some soup
I'm going to need some salt
This is pretty bland as well
But I like it
Then over here...
Go away cucumber
Put this here

[Switch positions]
No strong flavors, but it's tasty
I typically don't enjoy bland food
There are Naengmyeon noodles here
Is this possible?
Can I eat this?
I like it better when it's cold
But eating it hot is not bad either
They gave me radish kimchi and scallion kimchi
1 bite
Delicious
It soaked up all the soup because it's been sitting here
[Refilling the soup]
[Just like new]
Naengmyeon with sashimi first
Similar but different

They're busy making the noodles because the orders keep coming in
Instant noodles
I like alternating between cold and hot foods
[Scallion kimchi]
So good
Should I put some salt and pepper in here?
Salt
This is just like beef broth
It tastes good to eat with both rice and noodles
1 bowl of rice, beef broth, and noodles? That will definitely fill you up
Not me though
Let's finish the Sashimi Naengmyeon
[It disappeared...]
You only have Zero Cider?
-Only Zero -Really? Why?
[Even the drinks are light...]

Thank you
[Negative calories]
I want some more Nokju Jeon Should I order some to-go?
I feel like I'm taking food to-go every time now
[Can't resist good food]
It's good even if it's cold
Even just by itself
So good
Some soup this time
With raw skate?
Not bad
Skate
Eat the nokdu jeon separately And eat the skate and beef together
I like everything here except for the drink
With some brisket
[Eating all the Asian Pears too]

[Gather the brisket]
[Skate on top]
I drink a lot of beverages when the food has strong flavors Just to neutralize it
I don't feel like I need to chaser because the food was very light overall
My mouth feels very clean
I saved this bowl for last
Since this is the main dish
I heard that you will either love it or hate it
And I love it
Wrap it with beef
I'll try it
Unseasoned cold beef radish soup
The broth tastes delicious
[Finished]
I was worried that it wouldn't suit my taste
So I was planning on doing this just once

But now I'm eager to search and try more Pyeongyang Naengmyeon around the country
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
